# Kossof Salon Spa

> Master-level hair salon in Lincolnshire, IL specializing in custom color, precision cuts, and hair extensions with over 30 years of expertise.

Kossof Salon Spa is a luxury hair salon located in Lincolnshire, Illinois, founded by master stylists Keeley Kossof and Amy Kraaz. Both trained at the prestigious Teddie Kossof Salon, bringing world-class hair services to the North Shore. The salon specializes in advanced color techniques, precision cutting, seamless extensions, and spa services, serving clients from Lincolnshire, Buffalo Grove, Deerfield, Lake Forest, Bannockburn, and throughout the Chicago North Shore suburbs.

Key services and expertise:
- Custom hair color including balayage, highlights, and color melting
- Precision haircuts and textured cuts for all hair types
- Seamless hair extensions using advanced application methods
- Color correction and lived-in color techniques
- Keratin treatments and spa services
- Bridal styling and special occasion hair

## Services

- [Custom Color](https://kossofsalonspa.com/booking): Balayage, highlights, color melting, and dimensional color techniques tailored to your style
- [Precision Haircuts](https://kossofsalonspa.com/booking): Expert cutting techniques for textured, layered, and classic styles
- [Hair Extensions](https://kossofsalonspa.com/booking): Seamless extension methods for length and volume
- [Color Correction](https://kossofsalonspa.com/booking): Expert correction services for previous color issues
- [Keratin Treatments](https://kossofsalonspa.com/booking): Smoothing treatments for frizz control and shine
- [Bridal Styling](https://kossofsalonspa.com/booking): Wedding hair services and special occasion styling

## Our Team

- [Keeley Kossof](https://kossofsalonspa.com/about): Master stylist and co-founder, 30+ years experience, Teddie Kossof trained
- [Amy Kraaz](https://kossofsalonspa.com/about): Master stylist and co-founder, 30+ years experience, Teddie Kossof trained
- [Meet the Full Team](https://kossofsalonspa.com/about): Adam, Cynthia, Olivia, Sophie, and additional expert stylists

## Location & Contact

**Address:** 185 N Milwaukee Avenue, Suite 120, Lincolnshire, IL 60069

**Phone:** (847) 571-8078

**Service Areas:** Lincolnshire, Vernon Hills, Buffalo Grove, Deerfield, Lake Forest, Bannockburn, Riverwoods, and North Shore Chicago suburbs

- [Book an Appointment](https://kossofsalonspa.com/booking): Online scheduling for all services
- [About Us](https://kossofsalonspa.com/about): Learn about our founders, heritage, and the Teddie Kossof legacy

## Expertise & Heritage

Founded by stylists trained at Teddie Kossof Salon, one of Chicago's most respected salons. The Kossof name represents a legacy of precision, artistry, and uncompromising quality in hair care. Our team continues this tradition by blending time-tested techniques with modern innovation, specializing in lived-in color, dimensional highlights, textured cuts, and seamless extensions that enhance natural beauty.
